headlines.title: Trump Suspends Military Escorts in Hormuz 1 Day Into Operation
headlines.description: President Donald Trump says “Project Freedom,” his newly minted military operation to escort commercial ships through the Strait of Hormuz and break an Iranian blockade, is suspended one day after it began. Trump said the pause will help diplomatic talks to end the war brokered by Pakistan. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Jeffrey Epstein possible suicide note released
headlines.description: A federal judge has unsealed a purported suicide note possibly written by notorious sex offender Jeffrey Epstein weeks before his death. It appears to state, in part, “they investigated me for months - found nothing” and “time to say goodbye.” NBC News’ Laura Jarrett has the latest.

headlines.title: ‘A watershed moment’: A pancreatic cancer drug is set to transform treatment
headlines.description: An experimental pancreatic cancer drug that’s been shown to double survival in patients with advanced stages of the disease is poised to revolutionize the way the cancer is treated, oncologists say.

headlines.title: Remembering Ted Turner
headlines.description: Remembering media legend Ted Turner, who died at age 87. NBC Nightly News anchor Tom Llamas reports.

headlines.title: Steve Kornacki breaks down primary races in Ohio, Indiana
headlines.description: NBC News’ Steve Kornacki breaks down primary races across Ohio and Indiana, including wins for Vivek Ramaswamy in the Republican governor’s race in Ohio and Sherrod Brown winning the Democratic Senate primary in his fight to regain the seat he lost in 2024, and how the races have been a test of the impact of nationwide redistricting efforts.

headlines.title: Republicans unveil map that carves up Tennessee’s lone Democratic district
headlines.description: Republican legislative leaders in Tennessee released a congressional map proposal that they hope to put in place before the midterm elections that would eliminate the state's only Democratic-controlled district.

headlines.title: Democrats keep control of Michigan state Senate after special election win
headlines.description: Democrat Chedrick Greene has won a special state Senate election in Michigan, NBC News projects, ensuring his party will keep control of the closely divided chamber in a key battleground state

headlines.title: Vivek Ramaswamy wins GOP nomination for governor in Ohio
headlines.description: Businessman Vivek Ramaswamy has won Ohio’s Republican primary for governor, NBC News projects, advancing to what could be an expensive and competitive general election with Democrat Amy Acton in a state that has been brutal for Democrats in recent elections.

headlines.title: Sherrod Brown wins Democratic Senate nomination in Ohio, setting up a key battleground race
headlines.description: Former Sen. Sherrod Brown has won the Democratic nomination in Ohio’s special Senate election, NBC News projects, paving the way for a nationally watched general election matchup against Republican incumbent Jon Husted

headlines.title: He pitched military service with a promise of lifetime healthcare. When he needed it, the system failed.
headlines.description: For more than a decade, Guy Shoemaker pitched military service to potential new recruits with one key promise: healthcare for life.“You’re going to have medical and dental for the rest of your life,” said Shoemaker, a retired Army sergeant first class and recruiter who spent a year in Afghanistan.

headlines.title: Interactive: How common is your first name? Your last name?
headlines.description: New first name and last name data shows which names in the U.S. are the most popular and which aren’t anymore.

headlines.title: FBI searches office of Virginia Democratic lawmaker
headlines.description: FBI searches office of Virginia Democratic lawmaker
